memoryArtifacts.headline: The History of the Chipman Name
memoryArtifacts.description: Taken from my grandfather Gardiner's Book of Remembrance.  No sources listed.  I've uploaded this mostly for the history of the Chipman name.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Chipman於1567年2月2日出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特特其時，他的父親Johanes Chipman47歲，母親Joana Hodge42歲。他於大約1593年與Margaret Chapman在英國結婚。他去世於1643年5月25日在英國薩默塞特朗 塞頓享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特朗 塞頓。

nameMeanings.name: Chipman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English chipman (Old English cȳp(e)mann), a side form of chapman, chepman ‘merchant, trader’; see Chapman , with which this name was interchangeable.

variants.name: Chapman
meanings: English: occupational name for a merchant or trader, Middle English chap(pe)man, chepman, Old English cēapmann, cēpemann, a compound of cēap ‘barter, bargain, price, property’ + mann ‘man’.
Jewish: adopted probably for a like-sounding or like-meaning name in some other European language; see for example   Kaufman  .

History: This name was brought independently to North America from England by numerous different bearers from the 17th century onward. John Chapmen (sic) was one of the free planters who assented to the ‘Fundamental Agreement’ of the New Haven Colony on June 4, 1639.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Chipman was born on 2 February 1567, in Whitechurch, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Johanes Chipman, was 47 and his mother, Joana Hodge, was 42. He married Margaret Chapman about 1593, in England. He died on 25 May 1643, in Long Sutton, Somerset, England, at the age of 76, and was buried in Long Sutton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Chipman est né le 2 février 1567, à Whitechurch, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Johanes Chipman, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Joana Hodge, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Chapman environ 1593, à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 25 mai 1643, à Long Sutton, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Long Sutton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Chipmanが1567年2月2日にイギリスイギリスドールセトウィテチャーチで生まれた時，父Johanes Chipmanは47歳，母Joana Hodgeは42歳であった。約1593年にイギリスでMargaret Chapmanと結婚した。彼は1643年5月25日にイギリスソメルセトロング スットオンで76歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトロング スットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Chipman(이)가 1567년 2월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 휘테c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johanes Chipman(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Joana Hodge(은)는 42세였다. 그는 대략 1593년 영국에서 Margaret Chapman(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1643년 5월 25일 영국 서머세트 론그 수턴에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 론그 수턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Chipman nasceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1567, em Whitechurch, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Johanes Chipman, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Joana Hodge, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Chapman aproximadamente 1593, em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 25 de maio de 1643, em Long Sutton, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Long Sutton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Chipman родился 2 февраля 1567 г. в местности уитечурч, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Johanes Chipman было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Joana Hodge, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Chapman около 1593 г. в местности Англия. Он умер 25 мая 1643 г. в местности лонг суттон, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности лонг суттон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Chipman nació el 2 de febrero de 1567, en Whitechurch, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Johanes Chipman, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Joana Hodge, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Margaret Chapman aproximadamente 1593, en Inglaterra. Murió el 25 de mayo de 1643, en Long Sutton, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Long Sutton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
